Short CV

Born in 1980, Feride Kulalı completed her undergraduate studies at Süleyman Demirel University Physics Department in 2005. In 2009, she completed her master's degree in Süleyman Demirel University Nuclear Physics Department. In 2016, she completed her Ph.D. in Nuclear Physics Department of the same university and won the doctor title.
